title: Greece opens public consultation on national framework for regulating AI under new EU law

title: UN chief calls on AI firms to come clean on environmental costs

title: Tin Stars As The AI Data Center Building Boom Heats Up
description: The price of tin is being driven up by strong demand for the old metal in modern electronics, including data centers being developed for artificial intelligence (AI)
content:
Not since the bronze age of roughly 4000 years ago has demand for tin been so strong nor the price as high, reaching a record three weeks ago of $58,900 a ton.
Bronze tools and weapons made with an alloy of tin and copper soaked up tin in earlier era... [2667 chars]
